summary: Intelligence report establishing that Wincham incorporated a new scheme company (LTW PROPERTY LTD, number 17121923) on 27 March 2026 — just days before this investigation. Documents the three definitive signals (SIC 68209, Wincham office as director address, name pattern) that confirm this is a scheme vehicle not a regular accountancy client. Includes the top 10 most recent scheme companies, assessment of whether Wincham is winding up (assessment: no), and implications for the GLO legal strategy.
